attribution: V. Panayotov, G. Chen, D. Povey, S. Khudanpur. LibriSpeech: An ASR corpus based on public domain audio books. IEEE ICASSP, 2015.
modifications: Extracted single FLAC from test-clean/1284/1180/1284-1180-0010.flac; re-encoded to 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV via ffmpeg -ac 1 -ar 16000 -c:a pcm_s16le. No trimming.
expected_text: Unc knocked at the door of the house, and a chubby, pleasant-faced woman dressed all in blue opened it and greeted the visitors with a smile.
